ddls:
CREATE TABLE "asset_classes" (
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset class */,
  "asset_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset class (e.g., INCOME, INFRA DEBT) */,
  "asset_class_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the asset class */,
  "asset_class_risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the asset class (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_types" (
  "investment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment type */,
  "investment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment type (e.g., Open-Ended, Close-Ended) */,
  "investment_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the investment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment record */,
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset class */,
  "investment_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment type */,
  "number_of_investments" INTEGER /* Number of investments in the asset class and type */,
  "total_investment_amount" REAL /* Total amount invested in the asset class and type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_investments_investment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_type_id") REFERENCES investment_types ("investment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_investments_asset_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_class_id") REFERENCES asset_classes ("asset_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset class */,
  "total_investment" REAL /* Total investment in the asset class */,
  "percentage_of_total" REAL /* Percentage of total investment for the asset class */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment for the asset class */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the asset class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_performance_asset_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_class_id") REFERENCES asset_classes ("asset_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend record */,
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset class */,
  "trend_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "trend_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the trend on the asset class (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_asset_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_class_id") REFERENCES asset_classes ("asset_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_profiles" (
  "risk_profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk profile record */,
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset class */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk for the asset class */,
  "risk_description" TEXT /* Description of the risk profile */,
  "risk_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the risk on the asset class (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_profiles_asset_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_class_id") REFERENCES asset_classes ("asset_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, financial analyst, client) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., portfolio manager, financial analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the client account */,
  "balance" REAL /* Account balance */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of client account (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client account */,
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset class */,
  "investment_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment type */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_transactions_asset_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_class_id") REFERENCES asset_classes ("asset_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES client_accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_transactions_investment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_type_id") REFERENCES investment_types ("investment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, risk) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the meeting */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client who participated in the meeting */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "meeting_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the meeting in minutes */,
  "meeting_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the meeting */,
  "meeting_status" TEXT /* Status of the meeting (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration event */,
  "user_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first user involved in the collaboration */,
  "user_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second user involved in the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date of the collaboration event */,
  "collaboration_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the collaboration event */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration event (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_user_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id_2") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_user_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id_1") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., transaction, login) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, in-app) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_description" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_storage" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., pdf, excel) */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date of the document */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_storage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feed" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "news_description" TEXT /* Description of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset class */,
  "market_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Value of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_class_id") REFERENCES asset_classes ("asset_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_data" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark record */,
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset class */,
  "benchmark_date" TEXT /* Date of the benchmark data */,
  "benchmark_value" REAL /* Value of the benchmark data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_data_asset_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_class_id") REFERENCES asset_classes ("asset_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peer_group_data" (
  "peer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peer record */,
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset class */,
  "peer_date" TEXT /* Date of the peer data */,
  "peer_value" REAL /* Value of the peer data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peer_group_data_asset_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_class_id") REFERENCES asset_classes ("asset_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_baskets" (
  "basket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom basket */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the basket */,
  "basket_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom basket */,
  "basket_description" TEXT /* Description of the custom basket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("basket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_baskets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_basket_assets" (
  "basket_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each basket asset */,
  "basket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the custom basket */,
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset class */,
  "asset_weight" REAL /* Weight of the asset in the basket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("basket_asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_basket_assets_basket_id FOREIGN KEY ("basket_id") REFERENCES custom_baskets ("basket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_basket_assets_asset_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_class_id") REFERENCES asset_classes ("asset_class_id")
)
